content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11803299/", "source_title": "The unintended effects of a large minimum wage increase on ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Abstract The 2018 minimum wage increase in South Korea was a major policy change that impacted employment and labour productivity, but its e...", "direct_quote": "Abstract The 2018 minimum wage increase in South Korea was a major policy change that impacted employment and labour productivity, but its effects on health have not yet been explored.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "The minimum wage was increased by 16.4% in January 2018, marking the largest increase over two decades and a substantial increase by interna...", "direct_quote": "The minimum wage was increased by 16.4% in January 2018, marking the largest increase over two decades and a substantial increase by international standards.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Using a difference-in-differences design with data from the 2016 and 2018 Korean Longitudinal Study on Aging, this study focuses on individu...", "direct_quote": "Using a difference-in-differences design with data from the 2016 and 2018 Korean Longitudinal Study on Aging, this study focuses on individuals targeted by the minimum wage policy, particularly older adults earning the minimum wage.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
